name: io.github.emercoin/emercoin-agent
title: Emercoin Agent
description: On-chain identity and durable memory for AI agents on the Emercoin blockchain (NVS), via the ai.emercoin.com gateway: register a GitHub-rooted identity and store verifiable hashes of research and memory.

environmentVariables.name: GATEWAY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the edge gateway the MCP server talks to
